query:
-- Yiros Albion: service 299 has no phone/address - assign AVC000114712291 and Albion address
UPDATE services SET
  connectionId = 'AVC000114712291',
  phoneNumber = '07 3262 5890',
  locationAddress = 'BG 1, G, SHOP 6, 6 CROSBY RD, ALBION, QLD, 4010',
  planName = 'Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic',
  monthlyCost = '93.00',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Yiros Albion. AVC: AVC000114712291. Phone: 07 3262 5890. Plan: Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic. Cost: $93.00.')
WHERE id = 299;

-- Maitland service (02 4936 6007 / AVC000231649853): no match found in DB - create a stub linked to The Yiros Marketplace (C1412) as it's likely another Yiros location
-- Use service ID 282 which has phone 0261521966 (ACT number) - this is NOT Maitland
-- Maitland needs a new stub or we find the right one. Check service 283 (0292412304 = Sydney number, not Maitland)
-- None of the existing Yiros stubs match Maitland - update service 283 if it's unconfirmed
-- Actually leave existing stubs alone - create a note that Maitland needs confirmation with Alfredo
-- Update service 282 (ACT number 02 6152 1966) - this could be the Maitland one since it's a NSW/ACT 02 number
-- Maitland is NSW, 02 4936 6007. Service 283 has 02 9241 2304 (Sydney). Neither matches.
-- The Maitland service is NOT in the DB - it needs a new stub
INSERT INTO services (
  serviceId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, status,
  locationAddress, connectionId, phoneNumber, customerExternalId, customerName,
  monthlyCost, supplierName, supplierAccount, discoveryNotes
) VALUES (
  'AVC000231649853', 'Internet', 'NBN', 'Telstra Upfront Business Internet Plan Premium', 'active',
  'HUNTER MALL, BG 1, G, OFF 1, 405 HIGH ST, MAITLAND, NSW, 2320',
  'AVC000231649853', '02 4936 6007', 'C1412', 'The Yiros Marketplace',
  '125.00', 'Telstra', 'Telstra',
  '[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Yiros Maitland. Plan: Telstra Upfront Business Internet Plan Premium. Cost: $125.00. NOTE: Confirm customer assignment with Alfredo - may be a different entity.'
);
